scripts.build: npm --prefix template/crf install && AIRWAYAI_CRF_SCHEMA_PATH=../../2.SA/projects/prj_20260716-1544/forms/screening-baseline-cpap-compliance/0.1.0/crf-schema.json npm --prefix template/crf run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/server dist/public dist/.openai && cp -R template/crf/dist-demo/. dist/public/ && cp sites/server.js dist/server/index.js && cp .openai/hosting.json dist/.openai/hosting.json
